title: Get BOOK-has-prime-image Relationship
user_story:
As an API consumer
I want to be able to get the prime IMAGE of a BOOK
So I can instantly load the IMAGE that best represents the BOOK
description:
* The ›has-prime-image‹ relationship for the selected BOOK is returned when one exists. -> Status Code \`200\`
* A successful request returns the relationship partner, but not the start node.
* An empty response is returned when the selected BOOK has no ›has-prime-image‹ relationship. -> Status Code \`200\`
* Requests with invalid ID are rejected. This can happen when there exists no node with the given ID or it is not a BOOK. -> Status Code \`404\`
